#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace TestDomain;

/// <summary>
/// Fluxor state for <see cref="OrderProjection"/> projection list view.
/// </summary>
public record OrderProjectionState(bool IsLoading, IReadOnlyList<OrderProjection>? Items, string? Error);

/// <summary>
/// Fluxor feature for <see cref="OrderProjection"/> state management.
/// </summary>
public class OrderProjectionFeature : Fluxor.Feature<OrderProjectionState>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override string GetName() => nameof(OrderProjectionState);

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override OrderProjectionState GetInitialState() =>
        new(IsLoading: false, Items: null, Error: null);
}
